title: crepis intermedia
intro: Crepis intermedia, also known as the rough hawk's beard or medium hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepis intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Crepis intermedia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
